title: Backend Software Engineer

requirement_sentences.text: Build and maintain scalable backend services handling millions of requests per day
3+ years of experience in backend software development
Strong proficiency in Python and familiarity with at least one other backend language
Experience designing and consuming REST APIs in production environments
Hands-on experience with AWS services such as EC2, S3, Lambda, and RDS
Design and implement relational database schemas; PostgreSQL experience required
Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and data science
Contribute to architecture discussions, code reviews, and technical documentation
Experience with containerisation using Docker is required
Knowledge of Kubernetes or other container orchestration platforms is a plus
Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Jenkins, CircleCI) preferred
Experience with event-driven architectures and message queues such as Kafka is a nice-to-have
Infrastructure-as-code experience with Terraform or CloudFormation is a bonus

raw_text:
Backend Software Engineer
Amazon

About the Role
We are looking for a talented Backend Software Engineer to join our Payments Infrastructure team in Seattle. You will build and maintain scalable backend services handling millions of requests per day.

Requirements
- 3+ years of experience in backend software development
- Strong proficiency in Python and familiarity with at least one other backend language
- Experience designing and consuming REST APIs in production environments
- Hands-on experience with AWS services such as EC2, S3, Lambda, and RDS
- Design and implement relational database schemas; PostgreSQL experience required
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and data science
- Contribute to architecture discussions, code reviews, and technical documentation
- Experience with containerisation using Docker is required

Preferred
- Knowledge of Kubernetes or other container orchestration platforms is a plus
- Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Jenkins, CircleCI) preferred
- Experience with event-driven architectures and message queues such as Kafka is a nice-to-have
- Infrastructure-as-code experience with Terraform or CloudFormation is a bonus
